prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-ODORREMOVER-10OZ-AMZN Product Type: TEXTILE_DEODORIZER Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Revivex Odor Eliminator, All-Natural Formula for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 10 fl oz Description: When washing just isn't enough, you need the odor eliminating power of Revivex Odor Eliminator, previously known as Mirazyme. Rather than hide or mask bad odors, Odor Eliminator utilizes a concentrated blend of natural microbes to safely remove odor.

From camping equipment to watersports gear, remove bad odors from outdoor fabrics once and for all with Revivex Odor Eliminator.

Revivex Odor Eliminator has been getting rid of odors-and improving friendships-for decades. Search Terms: scuba odor remover after season cleaner sleeping bag fresh scent outdoor sports wetsuit stain wash in solution Features: - All-natural odor eliminator - Use the concentrated formula with water-activated enzymes that penetrate fabric pores to remove odor; treat multiple garments with just half an ounce in 20 gallons of water - Soak outerwear, tents, athletic clothes, shoes, and pet gear with this gentle solution; also effective on neoprene, nylon, polyester, and GORE-TEX fabrics - Spray or soak for hard to wash gear; compatible with washing machines and available in 2 fl oz and 10 fl oz - Packaging may vary === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Revivex Odor Eliminator 10 fl oz

openai.item_name: GEAR AID 10-fl oz Revivex Odor Eliminator

anthropic.title_differentiation: All-Natural Enzyme Formula, Removes Odor From Tents And Sports Gear, Water-Activated Microbes, Safe For Neoprene And Gore-Tex

openai.title_differentiation: All Natural Microbes, Water Activated Enzymes, Safe For Tents Footwear Sports Gear, Spray Or Soak, Machine Washable
